UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information within the application. This entity stores metadata about the user linked to their authentication ID, but no sensitive authentication data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity, corresponding to the external authentication system's user ID.

displayName.description: The user's display name or preferred name.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was initially created.

lastLogin.description: Timestamp indicating the user's last login.

Activity.title: Activity
Activity.description: Represents a logged training activity, such as a bike ride, run, or swim.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Activity entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who performed this activity. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Activity)

type.description: The type of the training activity (e.g., 'ride', 'run', 'swim', 'hike').

date.description: Date and time when the activity took place.

durationSeconds.description: Total duration of the activity in seconds.

distanceKm.description: Total distance covered during the activity in kilometers.

elevationGainMeters.description: Total elevation gain achieved during the activity in meters.

averagePowerWatts.description: Average power output in watts during the activity (primarily for cycling).

normalizedPowerWatts.description: Normalized power output in watts, a more accurate measure of physiological cost (primarily for cycling).

averageHeartRateBpm.description: Average heart rate in beats per minute during the activity.

tss.description: Training Stress Score (TSS) quantifying the training load of the activity.

rpe.description: Rate of Perceived Exertion (RPE) on a scale (e.g., 1-10) for the activity.

notes.description: Any additional notes or comments about the activity.

fitFileUri.description: URI to the original .fit file uploaded for this activity, if applicable.

gpxFileUri.description: URI to the original .gpx file uploaded for this activity, if applicable.

TrainingMetric.title: TrainingMetric
TrainingMetric.description: Represents daily calculated training metrics for performance tracking, such as CTL, ATL, and TSB.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TrainingMetric entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile for whom these metrics are calculated. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N TrainingMetric)

date.description: The specific date for which these training metrics are recorded.

ctl.description: Chronic Training Load (CTL), representing long-term fitness and training volume.

atl.description: Acute Training Load (ATL), representing short-term fatigue from recent training.

tsb.description: Training Stress Balance (TSB), indicating the balance between fitness and fatigue, suggesting readiness to perform.

TrainingGoal.title: TrainingGoal
TrainingGoal.description: Represents a specific training objective or goal set by the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TrainingGoal entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who set this goal. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N TrainingGoal)

name.description: A descriptive name for the training goal.

description.description: Detailed description of what the goal entails.

startDate.description: The date when the training goal officially started.

endDate.description: The target date for achieving the training goal.

targetMetric.description: The specific metric being targeted by this goal (e.g., 'distance', 'elevation', 'power').

targetValue.description: The numerical target value for the chosen metric (e.g., 1000 for 1000km distance).

status.description: The current status of the goal (e.g., 'active', 'completed', 'archived', 'on_hold').

TrainingPlan.title: TrainingPlan
TrainingPlan.description: Represents a structured training plan designed to achieve one or more training goals.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TrainingPlan entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created or is following this plan. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N TrainingPlan)

name.description: A descriptive name for the training plan.

description.description: Detailed description of the training plan, its focus, and methodology.

startDate.description: The planned start date for the training plan.

endDate.description: The planned end date for the training plan.

goalId.description: Reference to a specific training goal that this plan aims to achieve. (Relationship: TrainingGoal 1:N TrainingPlan)

Bike.title: Bike
Bike.description: Represents a user's bicycle, storing general information and overall tracking metrics.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Bike entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this bike. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Bike)

name.description: A user-defined name for the bike (e.g., 'Road Bike', 'Mountain Bike', 'Commuter').

brand.description: The brand or manufacturer of the bike.

model.description: The specific model name of the bike.

weightKg.description: The weight of the bike in kilograms.

price.description: The purchase price of the bike.

purchaseDate.description: The date when the bike was purchased.

totalDistanceKm.description: The cumulative total distance ridden on this bike in kilometers (calculated field).

status.description: The current status of the bike (e.g., 'active', 'archived', 'sold').

Component.title: Component
Component.description: Represents an individual bicycle component with its own tracking and maintenance history.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Component entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this component. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Component)

bikeId.description: Reference to the Bike on which this component is currently installed or was previously installed. (Relationship: Bike 1:N Component)

type.description: The type of the component (e.g., 'chain', 'tires', 'cassette', 'brake pads', 'derailleur').

brand.description: The brand or manufacturer of the component.

model.description: The specific model name of the component.

purchaseDate.description: The date when the component was purchased.

price.description: The purchase price of the component.

initialDistanceKm.description: The distance (in kilometers) already recorded on the component at the time of its installation, if it was not new.

currentDistanceKm.description: The cumulative total distance accumulated on this component in kilometers (calculated field).

estimatedLifespanDistanceKm.description: The manufacturer's or user's estimated lifespan of the component in kilometers.

estimatedLifespanMonths.description: The estimated lifespan of the component in months, useful for time-based wear (optional).

alertThresholdPercentage.description: The percentage of estimated lifespan (0-100) at which a wear alert should be triggered (e.g., 80 for 80% wear).

installationDate.description: The date when the component was installed on the bike.

removalDate.description: The date when the component was removed from the bike (if replaced or retired).

status.description: The current status of the component (e.g., 'active', 'retired', 'stored', 'disposed').

MaintenanceLog.title: MaintenanceLog
MaintenanceLog.description: Records maintenance actions performed on a bike or a specific component.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MaintenanceLog entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who recorded this maintenance. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N MaintenanceLog)

componentId.description: Reference to the specific component for which maintenance was performed. (Relationship: Component 1:N MaintenanceLog)

bikeId.description: Reference to the bike for which maintenance was performed, if not component-specific (e.g., 'full bike wash'). If 'componentId' is set, this should typically match the component's parent bike. (Relationship: Bike 1:N MaintenanceLog)

date.description: Date and time when the maintenance was performed.

cost.description: The cost incurred for this maintenance action.

notes.description: Detailed notes about the maintenance performed, observations, or parts used.

action.description: The type of maintenance action performed (e.g., 'cleaned', 'replaced', 'lubed', 'inspected', 'adjusted').

Recipe.title: Recipe
Recipe.description: Represents a culinary recipe, including ingredients, instructions, and user preferences.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Recipe entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created or saved this recipe. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Recipe)

name.description: The name or title of the recipe.

description.description: A short description or summary of the recipe.

preparationTimeMinutes.description: Estimated time required for preparation in minutes.

cookingTimeMinutes.description: Estimated time required for cooking in minutes.

servings.description: The number of portions or servings the recipe yields.

instructions.description: An ordered list of steps or instructions for preparing the recipe.

ingredients.description: A list of ingredients required for the recipe, each with its quantity and unit.

isFavorite.description: Indicates if the user has marked this recipe as a favorite.

personalRating.description: The user's personal rating for the recipe on a scale (e.g., 1-5).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the recipe was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the recipe was last updated.

tagIds.description: References to Tags associated with this recipe, allowing for multi-level categorization. (Relationship: Tag N:N Recipe)

Tag.title: Tag
Tag.description: Represents a categorical tag used for organizing recipes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Tag entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created or uses this tag. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Tag)

name.description: The name of the tag (e.g., 'Italian', 'High Protein', 'Breakfast').

type.description: The category type of the tag (e.g., 'cuisine', 'mealType', 'macroFocus', 'technique').

colorHex.description: Hexadecimal color code for visual representation of the tag in the UI.

PantryItem.title: PantryItem
PantryItem.description: Represents a single item stored in the user's pantry or stock.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PantryItem entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this pantry item. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N PantryItem)

name.description: The name of the pantry item (e.g., 'Rice', 'Canned Tomatoes', 'Olive Oil').

categoryId.description: Reference to the category this pantry item belongs to. (Relationship: PantryCategory 1:N PantryItem)

quantity.description: The current quantity of the item in stock.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the item (e.g., 'kg', 'can', 'pack', 'bottle').

expirationDate.description: The expiration date of the item.

barcode.description: The barcode number of the item, if available for quick scanning.

notes.description: Additional notes or details about the pantry item.

location.description: The physical storage location of the item (e.g., 'fridge', 'freezer', 'cupboard', 'spices').

lastUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the item's details (e.g., quantity) were last updated.

PantryCategory.title: PantryCategory
PantryCategory.description: Represents a user-defined category for organizing pantry items.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PantryCategory entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this category. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N PantryCategory)

name.description: The name of the pantry category (e.g., 'Vegetables', 'Dairy', 'Grains').

WeatherForecast.title: WeatherForecast
WeatherForecast.description: Stores weather forecast data for a specific location and time, used for cycling recommendations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WeatherForecast entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile for whom this forecast was fetched. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N WeatherForecast)

locationName.description: A user-friendly name for the forecast location (e.g., 'Home', 'Work').

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the forecast location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the forecast location.

forecastTimestamp.description: The specific timestamp for which this forecast data is valid.

recordedAt.description: The timestamp when this forecast data was fetched or recorded from the external API.

temperatureCelsius.description: The temperature in Celsius at the forecast timestamp.

feelsLikeTemperatureCelsius.description: The 'feels like' temperature in Celsius, accounting for wind chill and humidity.

windSpeedKmh.description: The wind speed in kilometers per hour.

windDirection.description: The cardinal direction from which the wind is blowing (e.g., 'NW', 'E').

precipitationProbabilityPercent.description: The probability of precipitation in percentage (0-100).

weatherDescription.description: A general textual description of the weather conditions (e.g., 'Clear sky', 'Light rain').

iconCode.description: An icon code provided by the weather API for visual representation of conditions (e.g., '01d').

CyclingClothingItem.title: CyclingClothingItem
CyclingClothingItem.description: Represents an item of the user's cycling apparel inventory, used for weather-based recommendations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CyclingClothingItem entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this clothing item. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N CyclingClothingItem)

name.description: A user-defined name for the clothing item (e.g., 'Castelli Thermal Jersey', 'Rapha Lightweight Gilet').

type.description: The general type of clothing item (e.g., 'jersey', 'jacket', 'shorts', 'gloves', 'base layer', 'shoe covers').

brand.description: The brand or manufacturer of the clothing item.

model.description: The specific model name of the clothing item.

minTemperatureCelsius.description: The minimum recommended ambient temperature (in Celsius) for comfortable use of this item.

maxTemperatureCelsius.description: The maximum recommended ambient temperature (in Celsius) for comfortable use of this item.

isWindproof.description: Indicates whether the clothing item provides protection against wind.

isWaterproof.description: Indicates whether the clothing item provides protection against rain/water.

layer.description: The layer type of the clothing item (e.g., 'base', 'mid', 'outer', 'accessory').

colorHex.description: Hexadecimal color code of the item, for visual representation or sorting.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the clothing item.

BikeSetup.title: BikeSetup
BikeSetup.description: Stores a user's saved tire pressure configurations for different bikes and conditions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BikeSetup entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this setup. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N BikeSetup)

bikeId.description: Reference to the Bike this setup applies to. (Relationship: Bike 1:N BikeSetup)

name.description: A descriptive name for the tire pressure setup (e.g., 'Road Dry Setup', 'Gravel Wet Setup').

riderWeightKg.description: The rider's weight in kilograms (including gear).

bikeWeightKg.description: The bike's weight in kilograms (including accessories).

tireWidthMm.description: The width of the tires in millimeters.

terrainType.description: The type of terrain the setup is optimized for (e.g., 'smooth_road', 'cobbles', 'light_gravel', 'heavy_gravel').

weatherCondition.description: The weather condition for which the setup is optimized (e.g., 'dry', 'wet').

recommendedPressureFrontBar.description: The recommended front tire pressure in bar.

recommendedPressureFrontPSI.description: The recommended front tire pressure in PSI.

recommendedPressureRearBar.description: The recommended rear tire pressure in bar.

recommendedPressureRearPSI.description: The recommended rear tire pressure in PSI.

notes.description: Additional notes or observations about this tire pressure setup.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this tire pressure setup was created.

Plant.title: Plant
Plant.description: Represents an individual indoor plant owned by the user, with its specific care requirements and status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Plant entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this plant. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Plant)

species.description: The botanical species name of the plant (e.g., 'Monstera Deliciosa', 'Ficus Lyrata').

nickname.description: A user-defined nickname for the plant (e.g., 'Patrice', 'Greeny').

location.description: The physical location of the plant within the user's home (e.g., 'living room window', 'kitchen shelf').

acquisitionDate.description: The date when the plant was acquired by the user.

photoUrl.description: URL to a photo of the plant for visual identification.

wateringFrequencyDays.description: The recommended frequency for watering the plant, in days (e.g., 7 for weekly).

lastWateringDate.description: The date of the plant's last recorded watering.

healthStatus.description: A simple visual indicator of the plant's current health (e.g., 'green' for healthy, 'yellow' for needs attention, 'red' for critical).

notes.description: Additional notes or care instructions specific to this plant.

PlantActionLog.title: PlantActionLog
PlantActionLog.description: Records specific care actions performed on an indoor plant, such as watering, fertilizing, or repotting.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PlantActionLog entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who recorded this action. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N PlantActionLog)

plantId.description: Reference to the Plant for which the action was performed. (Relationship: Plant 1:N PlantActionLog)

date.description: Date and time when the action was performed.

notes.description: Additional notes or details about the action (e.g., 'used organic fertilizer', 'moved to brighter spot').

BudgetCategory.title: BudgetCategory
BudgetCategory.description: Represents a user-defined category for personal financial budgeting.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BudgetCategory entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this budget category. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N BudgetCategory)

name.description: The name of the budget category (e.g., 'Groceries', 'Transport', 'Subscriptions', 'Bike Gear').

monthlyBudgetAmount.description: The target monthly budget amount allocated for this category.

colorHex.description: Hexadecimal color code for visual representation of the category in the UI.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Represents a single manual financial expense recorded by the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Expense entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who recorded this expense. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Expense)

date.description: The date when the expense occurred.

amount.description: The amount of the expense in local currency.

budgetCategoryId.description: Reference to the budget category this expense falls under. (Relationship: BudgetCategory 1:N Expense)

notes.description: Additional notes or details about the expense.

description.description: A short, descriptive label for the expense (e.g., 'Coffee', 'Groceries store', 'New tires').

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a domestic task or reminder, including details like due date and recurrence.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Task entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created or is assigned this task. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Task)

title.description: The title or brief description of the task.

description.description: A more detailed description of the task.

dueDate.description: The target due date for completing the task.

isRecurring.description: Indicates whether the task is a recurring one.

recurrencePattern.description: A string describing the recurrence pattern (e.g., 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'every_3_months', 'yearly').

categoryId.description: Reference to the category this task belongs to. (Relationship: TaskCategory 1:N Task)

status.description: The current status of the task (e.g., 'pending', 'completed', 'snoozed', 'overdue').

completedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the task was marked as completed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the task was initially created.

TaskCategory.title: TaskCategory
TaskCategory.description: Represents a user-defined category for organizing tasks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TaskCategory entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this category. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N TaskCategory)

name.description: The name of the task category (e.g., 'Household', 'Admin', 'Bike Maintenance', 'Garden').

colorHex.description: Hexadecimal color code for visual representation of the category in the UI.

HealthMetric.title: HealthMetric
HealthMetric.description: Records daily health and well-being metrics for the user, such as weight, sleep, and hydration.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HealthMetric entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile for whom these metrics are recorded. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N HealthMetric)

date.description: The specific date for which these health metrics are recorded.

weightKg.description: The user's body weight in kilograms.

sleepHours.description: The number of hours of sleep recorded for the day.

hydrationLiters.description: The daily hydration intake in liters.

notes.description: Additional notes or observations about the health metrics for the day.

HealthGoal.title: HealthGoal
HealthGoal.description: Represents a personal health and well-being goal set by the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HealthGoal entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who set this goal. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N HealthGoal)

name.description: A descriptive name for the health goal.

description.description: Detailed description of what the health goal entails.

startDate.description: The date when the health goal officially started.

endDate.description: The target date for achieving the health goal.

targetMetric.description: The specific health metric being targeted by this goal (e.g., 'weight', 'sleep_hours', 'body_fat_percentage').

targetValue.description: The numerical target value for the chosen metric (e.g., 70 for 70kg weight, 8 for 8 hours of sleep).

status.description: The current status of the goal (e.g., 'active', 'completed', 'archived', 'on_hold').

definition.description: Stores the profile information for a specific user. The document ID corresponds to the Firebase Authentication User ID.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, matching Firebase Authentication UID.

params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: goalId

definition.description: Collection of structured training plans created or followed by a user. Each document includes the 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: planId
params.description: The unique identifier for the training plan.

definition.description: Collection of bicycles owned by a user. Each document includes the 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: bikeId

definition.description: Collection of bicycle components owned by a user, linked to a specific bike. Each document includes the 'userId' and 'bikeId' for authorization independence and direct reference.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: componentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the component.

definition.description: Collection of maintenance records for bikes or components. Each document includes 'userId', 'bikeId', and 'componentId' for authorization and direct reference, ensuring independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: logId
params.description: The unique identifier for the maintenance log entry.

definition.description: Collection of culinary recipes created or saved by a user. Each document includes the 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: recipeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the recipe.

definition.description: Collection of user-defined tags for organizing recipes. Each document includes the 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: tagId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tag.

definition.description: Collection of items in the user's pantry. Each document includes the 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: pantryItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the pantry item.

params.name: categoryId

definition.description: Collection of cached weather forecasts fetched for the user. Each document includes the 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: forecastId
params.description: The unique identifier for the weather forecast entry.

definition.description: Collection of the user's cycling apparel inventory. Each document includes the 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: itemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the cycling clothing item.

definition.description: Collection of saved tire pressure setups for a user's bikes. Each document includes the 'userId' and 'bikeId' for authorization and direct reference, ensuring independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: setupId
params.description: The unique identifier for the bike setup.

definition.description: Collection of indoor plants owned by a user. Each document includes the 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: plantId
params.description: The unique identifier for the plant.

definition.description: Collection of care actions recorded for a user's plants. Each document includes 'userId' and 'plantId' for authorization and direct reference, ensuring independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: logId
params.description: The unique identifier for the plant action log entry.

definition.description: Collection of user-defined financial budget categories. Each document includes the 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the budget category.

definition.description: Collection of personal financial expenses recorded by a user. Each document includes 'userId' and 'budgetCategoryId' for authorization and direct reference, ensuring independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: expenseId
params.description: The unique identifier for the expense.

definition.description: Collection of domestic tasks and reminders for a user. Each document includes 'userId' and 'categoryId' for authorization and direct reference, ensuring independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: taskId
params.description: The unique identifier for the task.

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore data structure adheres strictly to the CORE DESIGN PRINCIPLES and DESIGN STRATEGY MANDATES to ensure a secure, scalable, and easily debuggable architecture. The primary strategy employed is **Structural Segregation** and **Authorization Independence via Denormalization**.

All user-specific data is organized under a top-level collection `/users/{userId}`. Each document within these user-specific subcollections (e.g., `/users/{userId}/activities/{activityId}`) explicitly includes the `userId` field in its data. This denormalization is **CRITICAL** for Authorization Independence. It eliminates the need for `get()` operations in Firestore Security Rules to check parent documents for ownership, which would break atomic operations and introduce performance overhead. Instead, rules can simply verify `request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId`.

This structure also naturally supports **Query Against Principals (QAPs)**. Since all documents within a user's subcollection belong exclusively to that user, any `list` operation performed on a path like `/users/{userId}/activities` will inherently only return data owned by `request.auth.uid`. There is no need for complex rule-based filtering, which is notoriously inefficient and insecure if misconfigured.

**Key aspects of the design:**

1.  **Rooted in User UID:** Every piece of personal data resides under a path `/users/{userId}/...`. The `UserProfile` itself is a document at `/users/{userId}`.
2.  **Explicit Ownership:** Each document within user-specific subcollections contains a `userId` field, serving as a denormalized ownership attribute. This makes security rules simple and highly performant (`allow read, write: if request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId;`).
3.  **Flat Subcollections:** While entities like `Component` logically belong to a `Bike`, they are placed as direct subcollections of `/users/{userId}/components/{componentId}` rather than deeply nested (`/users/{userId}/bikes/{bikeId}/components/{componentId}`). This avoids overly deep paths, simplifies rule writing, and makes data access more flexible without complex parent traversals.
4.  **Descriptive Wildcards:** Wildcards in paths are semantically named (e.g., `{userId}`, `{activityId}`) for clarity and debuggability.
5.  **Status Fields:** Entities with lifecycle states (e.g., `TrainingGoal.status`, `Task.status`) utilize a single, explicit `status` field, adhering to the principle of Explicit State Modeling.
6.  **DBAC Alignment:** Authorization relies solely on `request.auth.uid` and the `userId` field within documents, aligning with Database-Backed Access Control. There are no custom claims used for authorization.

This architecture provides a robust foundation for `LifeCycle Pro`, ensuring that data is securely isolated, easy to query, and straightforward to manage from a rules perspective, while remaining scalable for future multi-user enhancements (which would involve adding explicit membership maps or global roles to shared data if introduced).
